/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/orderbook_sim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/orderbook_sim.dir/src/matching_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/orderbook_sim.dir/src/order_book.cpp.o CMakeFiles/orderbook_sim.dir/src/order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/orderbook_sim.dir/src/trade.cpp.o CMakeFiles/orderbook_sim.dir/src/benchmark.cpp.o -o orderbook_sim
